name: friends world
developer: kylacpp, 上海块体客科技有限公司
publisher: kylacpp, 上海块体客科技有限公司
short_description: This is a voxel style sandbox game that focuses on survival. You can do anything inside and destroy any block. and cooperatively survive and fight with friends in a world. If you like playing Minecraft, this is a game you must not miss.
detailed_description:
"WASD" Move "Space" Jump "Shift" Run "E or Tab" Backpack Compositing "Right-Click" Interaction "F5" Switch Perspective "ESC" Menu "Mouse Wheel and Number Keys" Switch Items
This is a voxel style sandbox game that focuses on survival.
You can do anything inside and destroy any block.
You can craft equipment, craft items, research items, and more.
There is hunger and thirst, and you need to collect fruit in the wild, or hunt, farm, to survive.

Collect stones, dig wood, mine, build shelters, and make more powerful equipment to survive.

If you like playing minecraft, this is a game you must not miss.
maybe? have more! please keep an eye on the game.
This game is not a replacement for “Minecraft“, but more like a standalone version of my favorite “Minecraft“ mod.
So I was like making a mod that I loved
